title: 弥生賞の後に・君にサプライズ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's taken the win! As expected, she
performed remarkably!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
She's just getting better and better! Did you see
that explosive power of hers? She shot out of the
paddock like a rocket!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I just know she'll win the Triple Crown this
year! I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: (They all have so much faith in me!)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Perfect!

The race is long over, and I'm taking a stroll to
help my dinner digest, when...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!
I find Fuji Kiseki training by herself.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hi, Trainer! Sorry for slipping off without saying
anything!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My next race is the Satsuki Sho—the first race of
the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's a high-profile race even among the classic
races, widely advertised and broadcast
everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has high hopes for me. When I think
about how much they expect from me, I just can't
sit still.

It seems the pressure is weighing on her. I can't let
her shoulder it all on her own.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Really? Are you sure? But you must be tired from
today...
choice_data_list: I'm sure. I'm your trainer, aren't I?
I'm sure. I'm your trainer, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe! So you are!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll take you up on your offer, then.
We train until it's almost curfew.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... How was my time?

I look at the stopwatch in my hand. It's a good
time, close to her personal best, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hmm... That's not good enough.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In order to give everyone the show they really
want, it won't be enough for me to simply run and
win.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I can go beyond my top speed and
stretch my limit just one step further.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it would make for a surprising race, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I guess it's all in the pacing. I'm going to stay a
little longer and work on figuring out my limits!

She tries, fails, and tries again as she attempts to
aim higher and get better.

She's trained far more than she should in a day.
Just when I glance up to tell her this will be her
last lap...

I catch sight of her streaming past me at an
unbelievable speed.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Faster! I have to run... faster!

She's running beyond her top speed. Dirt flies
into the air and the wind howls.

She looks like a rocket, tearing off into space.
No. She looks more like a shooting star, blazing
through the night sky.

Underneath the watchful moon, Fuji Kiseki sprints
past the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

It's strange. There's no one around us, but I feel
like I can hear the sound of a crowd cheering for
her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... How was that? How'd I do?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hey, you've dropped the stopwatch!

I must have been so enthralled that I didn't even
realize I had dropped it!

But there's no doubt that Fuji Kiseki ran faster
than she's ever run during that final sprint.

If she can run that fast, then winning the Triple
Crown isn't such a distant dream. But more than
anything...

In that moment, it seems more clear than ever
that Fuji Kiseki has what it takes to be a true
entertainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's a high-profile race even among the classic
races, widely advertised and broadcast
everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has high hopes for me. When I think
about how much they expect from me, I just can't
sit still.

She seems nervous about stepping onto such a
big stage, and I wonder what I can do to help her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Training at the beach makes it feel like
we're at summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The wind feels so nice and cool. Be right back! I'm
going to do a quick lap!

After that talk with Fuji Kiseki, I looked up scenic
areas in Kanto, found a beach famous for its
scenery, and brought her here to train.

Apparently, it's particularly breathtaking right
around sunset.

I also have one more trick up my sleeve, so to
speak.
choice_data_list: (I'm going to make this work or die trying!)

text_block_list.text:
I actually spent all night practicing a magic trick
for her.

As I go through drills and help Fuji Kiseki train, I
hope that she'll be able to find some peace and
quiet today.
The hours pass, and finally, the sun begins to set.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Look, Trainer! The view's gorgeous... It's like a
painting!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The ocean looks like molten gold. I had no idea a
sunset could look so beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just the sight of it makes me feel like I've been
reinvigorated, body and soul!

This isn't the only surprise I have in store for her,
though. I point upward toward the first star of the
evening.
choice_data_list: Behold, a star befitting of your grace!
Behold, a star befitting of your grace!

text_block_list.text:
I reach out in a grand gesture and move as if I'm
plucking the star from the sky. Then, I slip the
star-shaped brooch I had palmed into my hand.
choice_data_list:
I shall whisk it from its perch as a gift for
y—oops!

I shall whisk it from its perch as a gift for
y—oops!

text_block_list.text:
I fumble at the last second and the brooch
tumbles from my hand, bringing the trick to a
sudden halt.

I crouch down hastily to retrieve the brooch. I'm
too embarrassed to look Fuji Kiseki in the eye.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You surprised me...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! What are you apologizing for? That was so
thoughtful!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I had no idea you had so much planned for me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You did all this because of how panicked I was
before, didn't you? I'm sorry for worrying you.
She takes the sand-covered brooch from me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's beautiful... It's the most beautiful star ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So this is what it feels like to be on the receiving
end of things...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

After that, we take in our fill of the beautiful
sunset together.

The next race is the Satsuki Sho, and I want to be
there for Fuji Kiseki every step of the way!
